source_spec: Baddeley Patreon V2; Denton V1 free WIP; JRIZZ Cults paid WIP
current_decision: Select a route only after licence provenance archive completeness and revision are recorded
verification_gate: Denton: audit missing head/STEP and provenance; paid routes: require explicit purchase confirmation and exact file inventory
license_boundary: Free listing or paid access does not by itself prove a complete openly redistributable package
notes: Static Printables and Gambody articulation files are reference-only and cannot replace a driveable package

source_spec: Public STL from Printed Droid
current_decision: Use only as a local bench aid if its terms are acceptable
verification_gate: Confirm dimensions fit the chosen chassis and do not redistribute
notes: Not a complete robot model

component: Complete fastener bearing shaft and printed-part set
source_spec: Not fully specified in the public control repository
current_decision: Freeze only after the licensed CAD package and assembly guide are reconciled
verification_gate: Generate a drawing-derived fastener and bearing count
license_boundary: Depends on the purchased mechanical package
notes: Do not purchase bulk hardware from video estimates alone

source_spec: v3.4.3 requires a Mega and Serial1 for iBus
current_decision: Use a genuine or electrically compatible Mega 2560
verification_gate: Compile and upload the pinned v3.4.3 sketch
license_boundary: Controller source is personal non-commercial with notice retention
notes: Current local compile gate passes

source_spec: Root README says one MDD10A dual-channel while v3.4 README says two MD10C
current_decision: Do not buy until board architecture and motor peak current are frozen
verification_gate: Confirm PWM DIR compatibility voltage continuous current peak current thermal path and fuse rating
license_boundary: Product hardware terms apply separately from firmware
notes: The public source is internally inconsistent

source_spec: MPU6050 MPU6500 MPU9250 or MPU6886 at I2C 0x68 or 0x69
current_decision: Prefer one known-good module with documented logic voltage
verification_gate: Pass WHO_AM_I axis test calibration and 400 kHz I2C run
notes: Wire Mega D20 SDA and D21 SCL

source_spec: v3.4 recommends FS-RX2A Pro and warns FS-iA6B exposes only 6 channels
current_decision: Use a receiver that exposes all 10 control channels over iBus
verification_gate: Menu t must show SIGNAL OK and every mapped channel
license_boundary: Radio compliance and product terms apply
notes: iBus signal enters Mega D19 and requires common ground

source_spec: Default map consumes channels 1 through 10
current_decision: Use a transmitter that can operate the receiver in 10-channel mode
verification_gate: Record failsafe behavior and complete menu p mapping
notes: Keep a physical power cut-off even when software failsafe is configured

source_spec: v3.4 drives it from Mega D7 and D8
current_decision: Use with a FAT16 or FAT32 microSD
verification_gate: Pass startup playback volume and brownout tests
notes: Sound files are not included and must be lawfully sourced

source_spec: Repository requires FAT16 or FAT32 and four-digit filenames
current_decision: Small reliable card formatted FAT32
verification_gate: Verify 0001.mp3 through 0032.mp3 address correctly
notes: Copy order is irrelevant in v3.4.3

source_spec: Repository states 8 ohm below 3 W
current_decision: Select only after enclosure volume and desired loudness are known
verification_gate: Check distortion module temperature and supply noise
notes: Do not exceed the DFPlayer output capability

source_spec: Repository says four standard servos and also says SG90 or similar
current_decision: Do not freeze model until required torque speed travel and packaging are measured
verification_gate: Measure static and dynamic load then require at least 2x torque margin
notes: The wording standard servo versus SG90 micro-servo is not a dependable mechanical specification

source_spec: Exact motor model ratio encoder and stall current are absent from the public repository
current_decision: Select only after wheel diameter mass center of gravity and target acceleration are known
verification_gate: Measure no-load current stall current wheel torque speed and thermal rise
notes: The README current figures are source claims and not a safe motor selection basis

source_spec: Repository states 4S total 16.8 V full 14.8 V nominal and 12.0 V empty
current_decision: Use only after the motor and regulator voltage limits are confirmed
verification_gate: Capacity C-rating connector and fuse must pass measured peak-current test
license_boundary: Battery vendor and transport rules apply
notes: Never series-connect unmatched state-of-charge packs

component: 5 to 6 V servo BEC or regulator
source_spec: Not fully specified by the repository
current_decision: Specify from simultaneous servo stall current plus margin
verification_gate: Verify rail stays within servo limits during all four-servo motion
notes: Do not power four servos from the Mega 5 V pin

source_spec: Repository states Mega 7 to 12 V but the battery is 4S
current_decision: Use a regulator or approved input path that never applies 16.8 V to a 12 V-rated rail
verification_gate: Test full-charge input startup ripple temperature and brownout recovery
notes: The final architecture depends on the purchased control board

component: Main fuse master switch and emergency disconnect
source_spec: Repository requires appropriate motor fuses and immediate power-cut capability
current_decision: Place a reachable hardware disconnect and branch protection near the battery
verification_gate: Prove zero motor output after activation under worst-case load
notes: Software stop is not the sole emergency stop

source_spec: 10 kOhm high side plus 3.3 kOhm low side to A15
current_decision: Use measured precision resistors and calibrate in firmware
verification_gate: Compare A15 reading with a calibrated meter at full and low voltage
notes: Enable battery monitoring only after the divider is connected

source_spec: Optional 1 kOhm resistor on the DFPlayer serial line
current_decision: Fit during bench wiring unless the selected module documents otherwise
verification_gate: Verify reliable playback without serial corruption
notes: Repository labels this recommended

source_spec: Optional 100 uF capacitor on battery input
current_decision: Fit near the affected electronics with correct voltage and polarity rating
verification_gate: Check supply ripple and temperature during motor steps
notes: Value is a starting point rather than a complete EMC design

component: Wiring connectors strain relief and common grounds
source_spec: Pin map is public but harness lengths and connector family are not
current_decision: Create a labelled serviceable harness after the chassis is frozen
verification_gate: Continuity polarity pull-test bend-radius and moving-part clearance gates
notes: No hot-plugging while energized

component: Wheel-off cradle tether and clear test area
source_spec: Repository warns about moving parts and supervised operation
current_decision: Use a cradle for first motor tests and a tether for first balance tests
verification_gate: Operator can cut power without entering the wheel envelope
notes: Secure the head before balance testing

component: Driver and regulator ventilation or heatsinking
source_spec: Repository requires adequate motor-driver ventilation
current_decision: Design after measured losses and enclosure airflow are known
verification_gate: Run a timed worst-case thermal soak below component ratings
notes: No temperature claim is accepted from an open-air bench test alone

source_spec: Pinned commit e90aacd and local Mega compile proof
current_decision: Use D-O_ibus_v3.4/D_O_printed_droid_rc_ibus_v3.4.3.ino
verification_gate: Recompile then record uploaded hash configuration and EEPROM map
license_boundary: Personal non-commercial license with notice and attribution
notes: Flash 17 percent and RAM 18 percent prove compilation only

component: Four servo outputs remapped away from Mega D0 RX0 and D1 TX0
source_spec: The deterministic v3.4.3 safe-pin transformer assigns mainbar/head1/head2/head3 to D22/D23/D24/D25 and preserves Serial0
current_decision: Build the safe-pin variant only from pinned commit e90aacd and source SHA-256 6cb3ce0d; do not connect actuator power until continuity and pulse tests pass
verification_gate: Logic-analyser proof of D22-D25 servo pulse width plus USB upload reset 9600 baud RX/TX menu integrity four-servo motion and failsafe
license_boundary: Arduino pin mapping is CC BY-SA; upstream firmware remains personal non-commercial and transformed source is not republished
notes: Software collision is removed in the compiled variant but physical wiring and powered behavior remain NOT_RUN

source_spec: Generated contract binds D22-D25 to transformed source SHA-256 f858c485 and releases D0/D1 for Serial0
current_decision: Use engineering/do_safe_pin_variant_wiring.csv and compile evidence together; reject generic v2.1 or unpatched v3.4.3 diagrams
verification_gate: Continuity-test all four servo nets confirm the transformed source SHA-256 then prove USB menu and pulse behavior before actuator power
license_boundary: Reference-page terms apply and the firmware remains personal non-commercial
notes: The wiring document now exists but flash and actuator-power release remain false until real bench evidence
